items.name: Masala Dosa
items.description: Crispy rice crepe filled with spiced potato masala, served with chutney & sambar.

items.name: Idli Sambar
items.description: Steamed rice cakes with piping hot sambar and two homemade chutneys.

items.name: Medu Vada
items.description: Crispy lentil donuts, golden fried and served with sambar & coconut chutney.

items.name: Uttapam
items.description: Thick rice pancake topped with onion, tomato & green chillies.

items.name: Veg Meals Thali
items.description: Rice, sambar, rasam, two poriyals, curd, pickle & papad on a banana leaf.

items.name: Full Meals
items.description: Complete banana leaf meal with sweet, savoury, rice, sambar, rasam & curd.

items.name: Special Curry Rice
items.description: Rice with two curries, kootu, appalam & a traditional sweet.

items.name: Mixture & Snacks
items.description: Homemade mixture, murukku, thattu vadai & ribbon pakoda — fresh fried.

items.name: Khara Pongal
items.description: Soft rice & lentil porridge tempered with pepper, cumin & ghee.

items.name: Filter Coffee
items.description: Authentic South Indian degree coffee in a traditional tumbler & dabarah.

items.name: Spiced Buttermilk
items.description: Chilled buttermilk with curry leaves, ginger & green chillies.
